latin: Dominus et Domina Dursley in domo Gestationis Ligustrorum habitabant. se 'normales' esse credebant. nihil insolitum amabant. filium parvum habebant nomine Dudley, quem maxime amabant.

glossary.ligustrorum: of the privets (a type of shrub)

questions.prompt: What did the Dursleys value most?

translation: Mr. and Mrs. Dursley lived at a house on Privet Drive. They believed themselves to be 'normal.' They loved nothing unusual. They had a small son named Dudley, whom they loved very much.
